policy.use_case: short deterministic packet after wrapper/provider troubleshooting
policy.note: Pins providers/routes that returned visible content on current-packet probes and enables direct POST where usage/finish diagnostics matter.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.rationale: Default route stalled. Baseten returned visible content on gpqa_bio_10 in ~22s with 2430 completion tokens.

z-ai/glm-5.2.rationale: Default route exhausted 4096 hidden completion tokens with no visible content. Venice timed out. Wafer returned visible content and the correct answer on gpqa_bio_10 in ~12s.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.rationale: Streaming returned visible content on a previously empty DeepSeek row; direct POST hung in probe. Keep streaming path.
